positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical botanical tapestry featuring bioluminescent glowing flora and interconnected geometric roots. The primary motif is a graceful, stylized orchid intertwined with crystalline vines and fractal leaf patterns. Use a deep indigo and emerald palette accented by glowing cyan and gold highlights. The style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with esoteric tribal geometry, achieving high contrast and clean, solid silhouettes suitable for a central apparel print. Cinematic rim lighting, ultra-detailed, vector illustration quality, perfect circular composition, clean lines, minimal gradient noise.
negative: blur, text, signature, logo, watermark, noise, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, low detail, gradient, sketch, photo, realism, messy, graffiti
